'''dhazala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldman|oldman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldman|oldman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhazala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzælæth|dhæzælæth]] || [[word:dhæzælæj|dhæzælæj]] || [[word:dhæzælæsh|dhæzælæsh]] || [[word:dhæzælæ|dhæzælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazazalath|dhazazalath]] || [[word:dhazazalaj|dhazazalaj]] || [[word:dhazazalash|dhazazalash]] || [[word:dhazazala|dhazazala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazalath|dhazalath]] || [[word:dhazalaj|dhazalaj]] || [[word:dhazalash|dhazalash]] || [[word:dhazala|dhazala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazaflath|dhazaflath]] || [[word:dhazaflaj|dhazaflaj]] || [[word:dhazaflash|dhazaflash]] || [[word:dhazaflaf|dhazaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazalatha|dhazalatha]] || [[word:dhazalaja|dhazalaja]] || [[word:dhazalasha|dhazalasha]] || [[word:dhazalaka|dhazalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazalath|dhazalath]] || [[word:dhazalaj|dhazalaj]] || [[word:dhazalash|dhazalash]] || [[word:dhazala|dhazala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazalathal|dhazalathal]] || [[word:dhazalajal|dhazalajal]] || [[word:dhazalashal|dhazalashal]] || [[word:dhazalakal|dhazalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazalathatha|dhazalathatha]] || [[word:dhazalajaja|dhazalajaja]] || [[word:dhazalashasha|dhazalashasha]] || [[word:dhazalaka|dhazalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazalathan|dhazalathan]] || [[word:dhazalajan|dhazalajan]] || [[word:dhazalashan|dhazalashan]] || [[word:dhazalakan|dhazalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazalathaoro|dhazalathaoro]] || [[word:dhazalajaoro|dhazalajaoro]] || [[word:dhazalashaoro|dhazalashaoro]] || [[word:dhazalakaoro|dhazalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
